title: selaginella ophioderma
intro: Selaginella ophioderma, also known as Spiny Club Fern, is a type of small, spiny, and flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella ophioderma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory problems, and support the immune system, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella ophioderma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
